title: Midnight Comte Bake
description: A rich and creamy American-style bake dessert. The combination of Midnight chocolate and Comte cheese will tantalize your taste buds.
instructions: Grease a 9x13-inch baking dish and set aside.
In a medium-sized bowl, whisk together the flour and sugar.
Add in the unsalted butter and mix until a crumbly mixture forms.
Press the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the grated Comte cheese and chopped Midnight chocolate.
Add in the eggs and mix until well combined.
Pour the cheese mixture over the crust.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the edges are golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
